Cause remember the score page started leaking blood
And we saw some weird ish
And like kept falling forward onto the piano
Why is this the thing that enter your mind?!
Cause he said stop
And then pulled out a flute to comfort us
From yk eldritch music brain damage
Which we wouldn’t have gotten if he didn’t guide us through the score

And we played Hammy’s unfinished score
But we played it wrong
sounds like a specific scp
Need more musical scps pls

content: So only after he starts directing our playing do we actually play it correctly and get brain dmg

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Reccomendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...
